username: we need URLs from prompts.md to be clickable on the individual boards. could we switch to a PDF but keep everything else the same?

cells.text: Any train station (metros/subways/light rail/etc. count)
Any wildlife/animal warning sign
A non-US national flag
A horse-drawn vehicle
Any regional restaurant (anything on this list )
A drawbridge/lift bridge
A decommissioned flying vehicle (airplane, helicopter, blimp, etc.)
A sign marking a municipality border
Any depiction of or a live goose
A greenhouse (enclosure for growing plants)
Dead End/No Outlet sign
A yellow automobile (taxis and school buses count)
any photo of your choice
Advertisement for, fairgrounds/sign for, or the actual event of a state or county fair
Non-Christian religious building
A sign displaying the local current temperature
Any war or veterans' memorial
Advertisement for a local radio station
A sign for a road named after any kind of tree
A sign for any road named after any United States president

cells.category: Easy license plate letter/number game, only one per card from this category
cells.text: A license plate serial containing the letter S
A sign advertising fireworks or fireworks store
Any amusement park (water parks count)
A sign with a population count on it
Any international license plate (not US, Canada, Mexico - does not have to be current or attached to a vehicle)
